name: core-network
title: OCI Core Network
summary: Creates a VCN with regional subnets (private by default), per-subnet route tables, optional internet/NAT/service gateways, and per-subnet VCN flow logs via the OCI Logging service.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory freeform tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' freeform tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' freeform tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional freeform tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: compartment_id
module.description: OCID of the compartment for all resources. No hardcoded OCIDs — always supplied by the consumer.

module.name: vcn_cidr_blocks
module.description: IPv4 CIDR blocks for the VCN (e.g., [\"10.80.0.0/16\"]).

module.name: dns_label
module.description: DNS label for the VCN (alphanumeric, <= 15 chars, immutable). Enables '<subnet>.<vcn>.oraclevcn.com' internal resolution.

module.name: subnets
module.type: map(object({ cidr_block = string prohibit_public_ip_on_vnic = optional(bool, true) dns_label = optional(string) availability_domain = optional(string) route_rules = optional(map(object({ destination = string destination_type = optional(string, "CIDR_BLOCK") network_entity_key = optional(string) network_entity_id = optional(string) })), {}) }))
module.description: Map of subnets keyed by logical name. Each subnet gets its own route table built from route_rules; rules target module-managed gateways by keyword (igw/natgw/sgw) or any external entity by OCID. OCI subnets are regional by default (availability_domain = null) — AD-specific subnets are legacy.

module.name: create_internet_gateway
module.description: Create an internet gateway (for public subnets).

module.name: create_nat_gateway
module.description: Create a NAT gateway (for private subnet egress).

module.name: create_service_gateway
module.description: Create a service gateway (private access to OCI services: Object Storage, etc.).

module.name: enable_flow_logs
module.description: Enable VCN flow logs (all subnets) into a module-managed log group. Requires flow_log_retention_days.

module.name: flow_log_retention_days
module.description: Retention in days for the flow-log log group (30-180 per OCI Logging limits).

outputs.name: network_cidr
outputs.description: CIDR blocks of the VCN (list — OCI VCNs support multiple).

outputs.name: subnet_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical subnet name to subnet OCID.

outputs.name: subnet_cidrs
outputs.description: Map of logical subnet name to CIDR block.

outputs.name: route_table_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical subnet name to its route table OCID.

outputs.name: internet_gateway_id
outputs.description: OCID of the internet gateway, or null when not created.

outputs.name: nat_ids
outputs.description: Map with key 'natgw' to the NAT gateway OCID. Empty when not created.

outputs.name: service_gateway_id
outputs.description: OCID of the service gateway, or null when not created.

outputs.name: default_security_list_id
outputs.description: OCID of the VCN's default security list (consumed by the oci/firewall/security-lists module if desired).

outputs.name: flow_log_id
outputs.description: Map of logical subnet name to flow-log OCID. Empty when flow logs are disabled.
